scenario.title: The Cost-Aware Architect
scenario.context: Your AI feature is getting expensive at scale. You need to redesign the architecture to optimize costs while maintaining quality, including smart batching, tiered AI usage, and efficient caching.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that redesigns an AI architecture for cost efficiency, including batching strategies, tiered processing, and cost monitoring.
constraints: Maintain response quality for premium users
scenario.exampleInput: Current: Every search calls Claude ($0.003/req). 1M searches/day = $3000/day. Target: $1200/day max. Ideas: cache common queries, batch similar requests, use cheaper model for simple queries.
hints: Identify which requests truly need AI

rubric.name: Cost Analysis
rubric.description: Is current vs target cost analyzed?

scoringGuide.excellent: Detailed cost breakdown with savings plan
